emergency_definition: Emergency means active leak, fire alarm triggered, or burst pipe.
For emergency calls transfer to dispatch at 415-555-0101, backup 415-555-0102.
Non-emergency requests can be logged for next business day follow-up.
Emergency definition now includes fire alarm trouble plus active water flow alarm.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Emergency definition now includes fire alarm trouble plus active water flow alarm.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: If transfer fails, say dispatch will call back in under 15 minutes.

integration_constraints: Integration note: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade from the agent.
Constraint: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms emergency status immediately. For emergencies, it captures name, number, and address before transfer. For non-emergencies, it logs details and confirms next-business-hours follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours (Monday-Friday 07:30 AM-06:00 PM PST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
notes: Generated from demo input: account_001_demo.txt | Updated with onboarding data
